tasks.label: playwright-round-a-cmd
args: cd frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3005 && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_USERNAME=ui.admin.round@devanalysis.local && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=RoundUi!20260426 && set PLAYWRIGHT_TARGET_USERNAME=ui_pod_round_a_20260426 && npx playwright test tests/ui-pod-admin-users.playwright.spec.ts --project=chromium --no-deps

tasks.label: seed-round-a-users
args: docker exec devanalysis114-backend python -c "from backend.marketplace.database import SessionLocal; from backend.marketplace.models import User; from backend.auth import get_password_hash; s=SessionLocal(); ae='ui.admin.round@devanalysis.local'; ap='RoundUi!20260426'; te='ui.pod.round.a@devanalysis.local'; tu='ui_pod_round_a_20260426'; admin=s.query(User).filter(User.email==ae).first(); h=get_password_hash(ap); admin=admin or User(email=ae, username=ae, hashed_password=h, is_active=True, is_admin=True, is_superuser=True); admin.username=ae; admin.hashed_password=h; admin.is_active=True; admin.is_admin=True; admin.is_superuser=True; s.add(admin); user=s.query(User).filter(User.email==te).first(); user=user or User(email=te, username=tu, hashed_password=get_password_hash('x'), is_active=True, is_admin=False, is_superuser=False); user.username=tu; user.is_active=True; user.is_admin=False; user.is_superuser=False; s.add(user); s.commit(); print('SEEDED_A', ae, tu); s.close()"

tasks.label: playwright-round-a-cmd-v2
args: cd frontend\frontend && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3005 && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_USERNAME=ui.admin.round@devanalysis.local && set PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=RoundUi!20260426 && set PLAYWRIGHT_TARGET_USERNAME=ui_pod_round_a_20260426 && npx playwright test tests/ui-pod-admin-users.playwright.spec.ts --project=chromium --no-deps

tasks.label: check-admin-login-ps
args: $body='username=ui.admin.round%40devanalysis.local&password=RoundUi!20260426'; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output ('STATUS ' + $r.StatusCode); Write-Output ($r.Content.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$r.Content.Length))); } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if($resp){ Write-Output ('STATUS ' + [int]$resp.StatusCode); $sr=New-Object IO.StreamReader($resp.GetResponseStream()); $txt=$sr.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output ($txt.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$txt.Length))); } else { Write-Output ('ERR ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: check-admin-login-ps-v2
args: $body=@{username='ui.admin.round@devanalysis.local';password='RoundUi!20260426'}; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output ('STATUS ' + $r.StatusCode); Write-Output ($r.Content.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$r.Content.Length))); } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if($resp){ Write-Output ('STATUS ' + [int]$resp.StatusCode); $sr=New-Object IO.StreamReader($resp.GetResponseStream()); $txt=$sr.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output ($txt.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(250,$txt.Length))); } else { Write-Output ('ERR ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: voice-proxy-smoke
args: $body = @{ transcript = '테스트 음성 요청'; task = '테스트 음성 요청'; tts = $false; auto_apply = $false; agent_key = 'reasoner'; run_id = $null; output_dir = 'E:\AI주식 자동매매'; conversation = @() } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/llm/voice/orchestrate' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } ; exit 1 }

tasks.label: voice-proxy-smoke-ascii
args: $body = '{"transcript":"voice smoke test","task":"voice smoke test","tts":false,"auto_apply":false,"agent_key":"reasoner","run_id":null,"output_dir":"E:\AI주식 자동매매","conversation":[]}'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/llm/voice/orchestrate' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } ; exit 1 }

tasks.label: voice-backend-curl
tasks.command: cmd /c echo {"transcript":"voice smoke test","task":"voice smoke test","tts":false,"auto_apply":false,"agent_key":"reasoner","run_id":null,"output_dir":"E:\AI주식 자동매매","conversation":[]} > %TEMP%\voice-body.json & curl.exe -i -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data @%TEMP%\voice-body.json http://localhost:8000/api/llm/voice/orchestrate

tasks.label: voice-backend-curl-ps
tasks.command: $body = '{"transcript":"voice smoke test","task":"voice smoke test","tts":false,"auto_apply":false,"agent_key":"reasoner","run_id":null,"output_dir":"E:\AI주식 자동매매","conversation":[]}'; $path = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'voice-body.json'; Set-Content -Path $path -Value $body -NoNewline; curl.exe -i -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data @$path http://localhost:8000/api/llm/voice/orchestrate

tasks.label: voice-function-direct
tasks.command: c:/Users/WORK/source/repos/parkcheolhong/codeAI/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import asyncio, json; from starlette.requests import Request; from backend.llm.voice_gateway import voice_orchestrate, VoiceRequest; scope={'type':'http','method':'POST','path':'/api/llm/voice/orchestrate','headers':[]}; req=Request(scope); payload=VoiceRequest(transcript='voice smoke test', task='voice smoke test', tts=False, auto_apply=False, agent_key='reasoner', conversation=[]); result=asyncio.run(voice_orchestrate(req, payload)); print(json.dumps(result.model_dump(), ensure_ascii=False))"

tasks.label: inspect-port-8000
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen).OwningProcess | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path | Format-List

tasks.label: voice-auto-apply-python-smoke
voice-auto-apply-pwsh-smoke
voice-auto-apply-pwsh-smoke-json
tasks.command: $payload = [ordered]@{ transcript='auto apply smoke test retry 5'; task='auto apply smoke test retry 5'; tts=$false; auto_apply=$true; agent_key='reasoner'; run_id=$null; output_dir='E:\AI주식 자동매매'; conversation=@() }; $json = $payload | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/llm/voice/orchestrate' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $json; Write-Output $res.StatusCode; Write-Output $res.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String }; exit 1 }

tasks.label: validator-proxy-smoke-3panels
tasks.command: $urls = @('http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/llm/voice/orchestrate','http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/marketplace/metrics/summary','http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/marketplace/ml-detectors/status'); foreach ($u in $urls) { Write-Output "=== $u ==="; if ($u -like '*voice/orchestrate') { $payload = [ordered]@{ transcript='smoke'; task='smoke'; tts=$false; auto_apply=$false; agent_key='reasoner'; run_id=$null; output_dir='E:\AI주식 자동매매'; conversation=@() } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $u -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $payload; Write-Output "status=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output ($r.Content.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(220, $r.Content.Length))) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $body=$reader.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output "status=ERR"; Write-Output ($body.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(220, $body.Length))) } else { Write-Output $_ } } } else { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $u -Method Get; Write-Output "status=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output ($r.Content.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(220, $r.Content.Length))) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $body=$reader.ReadToEnd(); Write-Output "status=ERR"; Write-Output ($body.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(220, $body.Length))) } else { Write-Output $_ } } } }

tasks.label: validate-admin-prefetch-and-ml-detectors
args: npm run build:admin; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/marketplace/ml-detectors/status' -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "LOCAL_STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); Write-Output 'LOCAL_STATUS=ERR'; Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/api/marketplace/ml-detectors/status' -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "PROD_STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); Write-Output 'PROD_STATUS=ERR'; Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } }

tasks.label: restart-and-validate-ml-detectors

tasks.label: validate-ml-detectors-after-rebuild
args: try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/marketplace/ml-detectors/status' -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "LOCAL_STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); Write-Output 'LOCAL_STATUS=ERR'; Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/api/marketplace/ml-detectors/status' -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "PROD_STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); Write-Output 'PROD_STATUS=ERR'; Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } }

tasks.label: rebuild-marketplace-and-verify
args: docker-compose up -d --build frontend-marketplace; $count=0; while ($count -lt 120) { $r = try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace/orchestrator' -TimeoutSec 15 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 } catch { 'error' }; if ($r -and $r -notlike '*error*') { Write-Output "✓ Marketplace reachable after $(($count+1)*5)s"; break }; Start-Sleep 5; $count++ }

tasks.label: rebuild-marketplace-final
args: docker-compose up -d --build frontend-marketplace; Start-Sleep 30; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace/orchestrator' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "✓ Marketplace 200 OK" } catch { Write-Output "✗ Marketplace error: $($_.Exception.Message)" }

tasks.label: verify-marketplace-final
args: try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace/orchestrator' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "✓ Marketplace 200 OK" } catch { Write-Output ("✗ Error: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message) }

tasks.label: verify-orchestrator-autocomplete
args: try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace/orchestrator?product=voice-engine-suite-basic' -TimeoutSec 15; if ($r.Content -like '*autoComplete="current-password"*') { Write-Output "✓ autoComplete found in orchestrator page" } else { Write-Output "✗ autoComplete NOT found in orchestrator page" } } catch { Write-Output ("✗ Error: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message) }

tasks.label: verify-clean-rebuild
args: Start-Sleep 180; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $($r.StatusCode)"; if ($r.Content -notlike '*ChunkLoadError*') { Write-Output 'ChunkLoadError RESOLVED' } else { Write-Output 'ChunkLoadError STILL present' } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $($_.Exception.Message)" }

tasks.label: rebuild-marketplace-formfields
args: docker-compose up -d --build frontend-marketplace; Write-Output 'Build started...'; Start-Sleep 60; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://metanova1004.com/marketplace' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $($r.StatusCode)" } catch { Write-Output "Status: checking..." }

tasks.label: rebuild-backend-cors-fix
args: docker-compose up -d --build backend; Write-Output 'Backend rebuild started...'; Start-Sleep 60; docker logs devanalysis114-backend | tail -20 | Select-String -Pattern 'cors origins loaded' -Context 0,2

tasks.label: verify-cors-loaded
args: Start-Sleep 15; docker logs devanalysis114-backend | tail -100 | Select-String -Pattern 'cors|CORS|metanova|xn--114' | Select-Object -First 5

tasks.label: check-cors-config
args: Start-Sleep 15; docker logs devanalysis114-backend 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -like '*cors origins loaded*' } | Select-Object -First 1
